news.title: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
news.summary: The personal consumption expenditures price index was expected to show a 4.1% annual increase. The index is based on the consumer's spending on goods and services.

news.title: Bayer wins Supreme Court case making it harder to sue over glyphosate in Monsanto's Roundup
news.summary: Glyphosate, used in Roundup weedkiller, is the most commonly used weedkiller in agriculture. It has long been linked to cancer claims.

news.title: Apple stock drops 5% on MacBook and iPad price hikes due to memory crunch
news.summary: Tim Cook said last week that Apple would hike prices due to surging memory and storage costs. Tim Cook: Apple will hike prices because of surging memory, storage cost.

news.title: GM reveals 2027 GMC Sierra pickup with new V-8 engines, redesigned styling
news.summary: The new GMC Sierra trucks are crucial to GM's sales and earnings, especially highly profitable luxury Denali and off-road AT4 models.

news.title: Micron is up 10% after blockbuster earnings, but has pulled back from highs
news.summary: The company's revenue more than quadrupled from $9.3 billion a year earlier to $41.46 billion, it reported on Wednesday.

news.title: Bayer’s stock jumps after Supreme Court sides with Roundup weedkiller manufacturer
news.summary: The court ruled that states cannot have differing labeling warning rules than federal law requires. The ruling was handed down in a ruling on the issue of genetically modified organisms.

news.title: A relative offered me a $25,000 home loan secured by a lien that must be repaid within a year. Is that fair?
news.summary: “He also wants me to downsize and move,” she says of her father. “He’s not a big fan of moving,’ she adds.

news.title: ‘Take the money while you can’: I’m a CPA and tell my clients to take their Social Security early. Am I wrong?
news.summary: Only 8% to 10% of people wait until age 70 to claim. “Only 8-10% of the people I know wait to claim until they are 70,” he says.

news.title: My houseguest left heat marks all over my table. I didn’t notice them until she was gone. Do I ask her to pay to remove them?
news.summary: “What drives me crazy is that she didn’t mention it,” he says of his wife. “What drove me crazy was she didn't mention it.”

news.title: First-quarter GDP gets big boost, but it’s not really great news
news.summary: The U.S. economy grew at a 2.1% annual pace in the first three months of the year. That's faster than the previously reported 1.6%.
